attributes.outputExcerpt:
read_file({"path": "docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md"}) → # Provider IDs — Stability Contract

## Canonical Provider IDs

The Vokda platform exposes 26 canonical provider IDs. These are the stable,
machine-readable identifiers used in API requests/responses, SDK types, catalog
data, and credentials. They MUST NOT change without following the deprecation
policy below.

| ID | Name | Type |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `aws-polly` | AWS Polly | cloud_provider |
| `azure-speech` | Azure Speech | cloud_provider |
| `bark` | Bark | open_model |
| `cartesia` | Cartesia | cloud_provider |
| `chatterbox` | Chatterbox | open_model |
| `chatterbox-turbo` | Chatterbox Turbo | open_model |
| `deepgram` | Deepgram | cloud_provider |
| `dia` | Dia | open_model |
| `edge-tts` | Edge TTS | cloud_provider |
| `elevenlabs` | ElevenLabs | cloud_provider |
| `gcp-tts` | Google Cloud TTS | cloud_provider |
| `gemini-tts` | Gemini TTS | cloud_provider |
| `huggingface` | Hugging Face | open_model |
| `kittentts` | KittenTTS | open_model |
| `kokoro` | Kokoro | open_model |
| `lmnt` | LMNT | cloud_provider |
| `marvis` | Marvis | open_model |
| `openai` | OpenAI | cloud_provider |
| `orpheus` | Orpheus TTS | open_model |
| `outetts` | OuteTTS | open_model |
| `pocket-tts` | Pocket TTS | open_model |
| `qwen3-tts` | Qwen3 TTS | open_model |
| `soprano` | Soprano | open_model |
| `spark-tts` | Spark TTS | open_model |
| `vibevoice` | VibeVoice | open_model |
| `voxcpm` | VoxCPM | open_model |

## Stability Guarantees

- **Provider IDs are stable.** Once published in this registry, a provider ID
  will not be removed or renamed without a deprecation window (see below).
- **Opaque string keys.** Consumers SHOULD treat provider IDs as opaque strings.
  Do not derive meaning from the ID spelling; instead use the `name` and `type`
  fields for presentation and routing logic.
- **No silent removal.** A provider ID that appears in the canonical set will
  always resolve in the catalog, even if the underlying pro

lso

- [Provider ID stability & deprecation policy](./PROVIDER_IDS.md) — canonical provider IDs, stability guarantees, and the deprecation lifecycle.

search_code({"symbol": "npm run test"}) → no definition named 'npm run test' found in the repository
read_file({"path": "package.json"}) → {
  "name": "vokda",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.3.0",
  "workspaces": [
    "apps/*",
    "packages/*"
  ],
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev:web": "npm --workspace apps/web run dev",
    "dev:api": "npm --workspace apps/api run dev",
    "amplify:sandbox": ". ./switch-aws-env.sh personal && npx ampx sandbox",
    "amplify:deploy": ". ./switch-aws-env.sh personal && npx ampx pipeline-deploy --branch main",
    "amplify:outputs": ". ./switch-aws-env.sh personal && npx ampx generate outputs --format json --out-dir .",
    "build:web": "node scripts/publish-catalog.mjs && npm run -w apps/web build",
    "check:web": "npm --workspace apps/web run check",
    "check:catalog": "node scripts/check-catalog-fresh.mjs",
    "build:sdk": "npm --workspace packages/sdk run build",
    "check:sdk": "npm --workspace packages/sdk run check",
    "lint": "npm --workspace apps/web run lint",
    "test": "npm --workspace apps/web run test",
    "generate:api": "node scripts/generate-api-catalog.mjs"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@aws-amplify/backend": "^1.21.0",
    "@aws-amplify/backend-cli": "^1.8.2",
    "@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb": "^3.1003.0",
    "@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb": "^3.1003.0",
    "@types/node": "^25.3.3",
    "playwright": "^1.58.2"
  }
}
